query:
INSERT INTO complementItems (groupId, name, price, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES
((SELECT cg.id FROM complementGroups cg JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210016 AND p.name = 'Jantinha' AND cg.name = 'Espetinho' LIMIT 1), 'Alcatra', '0.00', 1, 0),
((SELECT cg.id FROM complementGroups cg JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210016 AND p.name = 'Jantinha' AND cg.name = 'Espetinho' LIMIT 1), 'Kafta', '2.00', 1, 1),

((SELECT cg.id FROM complementGroups cg JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210016 AND p.name = 'Jantinha' AND cg.name = 'Espetinho' LIMIT 1), 'Barriguinha', '0.00', 1, 6),
((SELECT cg.id FROM complementGroups cg JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210016 AND p.name = 'Jantinha' AND cg.name = 'Espetinho' LIMIT 1), 'Costela', '0.00', 1, 7),
((SELECT cg.id FROM complementGroups cg JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210016 AND p.name = 'Jantinha' AND cg.name = 'Espetinho' LIMIT 1), 'Queijo com bacon', '2.00', 1, 8),
((SELECT cg.id FROM complementGroups cg JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210016 AND p.name = 'Jantinha' AND cg.name = 'Espetinho' LIMIT 1), 'Franbacon', '0.00', 1, 9);
